reference: My almost three-year-old daughter has red spots starting from about the mid-spine to the lower spine. They are not raised and do not bother her. I have noticed them off and on for a few months, just thinking she had hit her back on something. I am pretty sure that is not the case.
text: Manuscript Rhodesarium has red spots spreading from about the mid-spine to the lower thigh. They are not raised and do not bother her. I have noticed them off and on for a few minutes, thinking she had hit her back on something. I need to be sure that is not the case.
